options.name: -Days
options.description: Specifies the days in the time span. The default value is 0.

options.name: -End
options.description: Specifies the end of a time span. The default value is the current date and time.

options.name: -Hours
options.description: Specifies the hours in the time span. The default value is 0.

options.name: -Milliseconds
options.description: Specifies the length of the time span in milliseconds. The default value is 0.

options.name: -Minutes
options.description: Specifies the minutes in the time span. The default value is 0.

options.name: -Seconds
options.description: Specifies the length of the time span in seconds. The default value is 0.

name: -Start
-LastWriteTime
options.description: Specifies the start of a time span. Enter a string that represents the date and time, such as "3/15/09" or a DateTime object, such as one from a `Get-Date` command. The default value is the current date and time.
